name: Pause menu - keyboard golden path
description: Keyboard variant of pause_menu.json. Keyboard input never flips CommonInput (stays MouseAndKeyboard), so there is no input-method-change to re-apply desired focus after activation - instead this spec relies on ACTIVATION-TIME desired focus, which CommonUI applies in any input mode but, in PIE, only when the game viewport is in the slate user's focus path (WITH_EDITOR gate in FocusLeafmostNode). The pre-pause keyboard nav exists purely for its focus-stabilize side effect (puts focus in the viewport before TogglePause activates the screen); the key itself goes to gameplay and is harmless while unpaused.

steps.note: activation-time desired focus + row relay, no gamepad flip needed
